title: User
description: A User object represents a user in a Notion workspace. Users can be either people (human workspace members) or bots (API integrations). User objects include identifying information such as name, email, and avatar URL.

type.description: The type of user. "person" for human workspace members, "bot" for API integrations.

avatar_url.description: URL of the user's avatar image.

person.description: Person-specific information. Only present when type is "person".

bot.description: Bot-specific information. Only present when type is "bot".

workspace.description: Whether the bot is owned by the workspace.

workspace_name.description: The name of the workspace the bot belongs to.
